entry.title: Sales Order Item Requested Delivery Date
entry.content:
There is a requirement for reporting the requested delivery date at the sales order line item level.
In the reports available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, the Requested Delivery Date is pulling from the sales order header (Ovrl Requested Delivery Date), not from the line item level, which causes inaccurate reporting for line-specific delivery planning.

Is there any standard report or app in S/4HANA Public Cloud that can show the Requested Delivery Date at item level, or is this currently only possible through custom development or consulting?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Sales Order Item Requested Delivery Date
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for raising this question.

As of now, in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the Requested Delivery Date field is derived from either the sales order header or schedule line, and is not maintained independently at the item level in standard reporting tools like Incoming Sales Orders – Flexible Analysis or List Sales Orders.

This is the system's standard behavior, and while the field may appear in item-level displays, it still reflects the header value unless schedule line details are used.

If item-level reporting on this field is a business requirement, there are two possible paths:

  • Submit an enhancement request via the SAP Customer Influence Portal (see KBA 2963059).
  • Explore a custom solution through SAP Consulting services, as this goes beyond the scope of standard product support. For clarification, refer to KBA 2706322 – What is Support – What is Consulting.

We acknowledge the need for greater clarity, and SAP is in the process of renaming the field to “Overall Requested Delivery Date” to reduce confusion about the level at which the data is maintained.

Kind regards,
SAP Product Support – S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: SAP Task Center does not display SBPA tasks
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I followed all steps described in blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/learn-how-to-configure-sap-build-process-automation-tasks-for-sap-task/bc-p/14102415#M181437, the tasks are being replicated to task center successfully, but I cannot see the task details.

I set the site as default as you instructed.

 

But when I try to open the details, it is rasing following error:

 

Refused to frame 'https://numenit-application-sandbox.us10.process-automation.build.cloud.sap/' because an ancestor violates the following Content Security Policy directive: "frame-ancestors 'self' https://*.us10.build.cloud.sap https://*.lcnc.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com https://*.us10.build.cloud.sap https://*.lcnc.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com".

I set the content-security-policy in SAP Build Workzone configuration but did not solve the issue:

 

content-security-policy = frame-ancestors 'self' https://*.us10.build.cloud.sap https://*.lcnc.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com https://*.us10.build.cloud.sap https://*.lcnc.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com https://*.us10.process-automation.build.cloud.sap

Does anyone have a recommendation?

Regards

Mauricio

entry.title: Repayment update type doesn't appear in bonds in treasury
entry.content:
Dear All, 

Please help me with my problem. 

I don't see the final repayment update type in the bond transaction, despite that I added it in the security ID (FWZZ), and it appears in the cashflow in FWZZ, i searched for it in cash flow tab, security view and valuation class view  in bonds but doesn't see it.

entry.title: Goal Plan: Metric Look Up Table Permission
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am facing the following issue:

I configured a Metric Lookup Table in the Goal Plan. Nobody shoud be able to see or edit the target-baseline and the metric lookup table. So fist I just not added the fields within the write and read permissions. But the fields were still visible and editable.

I added the auto population (see screenshot).

Then I added a none-permission (see screenshot).

 

Still both fields are visible and editable. Do you have any idea?

Best regards,
Linda

entry.title: Re: Connecting FTE and Pay Component fields

entry.title: Re: Connecting FTE and Pay Component fields
entry.content: This change should be in the Pay Component field in the Compensation Information.

entry.content:
Hi @wblanco & @kirsikka 

There is an ongoing investigation on this scenario. More details can be found in the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3600888

Once there are news on the investigation, Support will update the KBA, Your team may bookmark the KBA to get notified on future updates to the document.

BR,

I tried this on my internal system and got the same result as yours.

Please open a ticket in component BC-SRV-APS-IAM.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: Search function in the app "Display IAM-Apps" returns...
entry.content:
Hi George, thank you for the response. I will open the ticket and share it here if i know a solution to the issue.
Best regards Lukas

entry.title: Re: Validation Rule - Compare Opening balances to Prior y...
entry.content:
Hi Eyal,

From SAP help you should have the option to have 'YTD for Previous Year' and 'Opening Balance' as measures for the operand:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4ebf1502064b406c964b0911adfb3f01/01d0ab5a8238483ab75a20f5132349a3.html?version=2023.001&locale=en-US

I can find the same in my sandbox for 2023OP SP3:

Remember that YTD is for the period you specify in the validation. You properly need to add period = 12 as 'Where' to the YTD calculation. The the rule should then validate YTD up to period 12 for the previous year.

Br

Martin Jul

entry.title: Issue with Oauth2 client credentials
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to establish oAuth2 connectivity between CPI and SuccessFactors. I am getting this error when I deploy the CPI interface using oAuth2 credentials.

com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException: Error in retrieving Authorization header, cause: org.apache.http.client.HttpResponseException: status code: 401, reason phrase: {"errorHttpCode":"401","errorMessage":"Unable to verify the signature of the SAML assertion. Please ensure that the assertion has a signature and the key pairs match the client ID. For more information, see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/d599f15995d348a1b45ba5603e2aba9b/4e27e8f6ae2748ab9f23228dd6a31b06.html."}

Any suggestions to resolve this issue ?

Regards,

Varun Vichare.

entry.title: Re: Legacy ID in SF LMS Class Connector
entry.content:
Hi @piotr_retecki 

It's not possible to use the Class Connector to populate the legacy ID/ COL_NUM99_VAL for Classes that were created manually through the UI.

  • https://me.sap.com/notes/2779336

To be able to use the Class Connector for such classes, first it would be necessary to manually populate the Legacy ID for them, which then will allow the usage of the Class Connector.

I get it can be a lot of work, but currently it's how the system behaves... There have been some enhancements requests on it, and the customers are welcomed to vote for them and/or create additional requests:

  • https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/251641
  • https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/321216
  • https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/316993 

For more details on enhancement requests, please check the KBA 2090228 - How to submit enhancement ideas for SAP SuccessFactors Products.

BR,

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements: Filter based on association property
entry.content:
In my case, having this in my cds interface view:

I just added this in my metadata extension of the consumption view:

and everything worked as expected!

entry.title: The SAP Community Feedback List is now live!
entry.content:
I am thrilled to finally announce that the SAP Community feedback list is now live!
You can go check it out in our Community Coffee Corner group.

This first version of the feedback list has been pre-populated with captured feedback, enhancement requests and bugs, to avoid repeated entries. 
You can upvote (kudo) the different items in the list, which will help give us a better understanding of what matters most to you. 
You can also add comments if you have questions, thoughts or insights to add to the different requests in the list. 

From our side, the feedback list gives us an opportunity to provide continuous updates on submitted ideas, feedback and bugs.
Each entry will change status as we process them: 
New = acknowledged feedback
Needs Info = if more information is needed to be able to process the request
Investigating = when we explore options
Accepted = items in development or being worked on. We will provide delivery dates as soon as we have them. 
Declined = declined items. A reason for decline will always be provided. 
Delivered = delivered items

For now, it will not be possible to submit new ideas directly to the list, but this might change in the future if we see that the tool works as expected both for us and for you. 
If there is any feedback we have missed, or you would like to submit new ideas to the board, please send us an email at community@sap.com, ask a question in the Questions about SAP Websites Q&A, or start a discussion in the Community Coffee Corner group. We will add the feedback to the board so that other community members can see the submission and vote. 

The list is an important piece of a more transparent contribution and feedback process, and we are looking forward to having a shared public space for communication around platform enhancements and reported bugs!

entry.title: Re: Fiori App: Manage Sales Order V2 does not start due t...
entry.content: Go to fiori app library to find that app. Follow that document to activate the app.

entry.title: Re: Configuring OAuth 2.0 and Creating an ABAP Program That Uses OAuth 2.0 Client API
entry.content:
Hi @lpodile ,

This is Regarding Testing done using Postman shared in the Blog.

POSTMAN:

Use the GET call with the main API endpoint. In the authentication, select the type as 'OAuth2.0'.

Based on the service provider, select the grant type on the right hand side. I have selected as Client Credentials. Provide the Access Token URL, Client ID and Client Secrete. Also provide the scope as configured at the service provider. Select Client Authentication as 'Send as Basic Auth header' and click on Get New Access Token.

 

Kindly share below details.

1.When you hit Get New Access Token u will get token. Using this Token did you make Get Call to get the status 200?

2.With the code shared in the Blog how are you getting access Token as I am unable to get access token

ABAP Connectivity API  NW ABAP Gateway (OData) 

Thanks

Deepthi

Piotr

entry.title: Implementing a “Buy X, Get Y” Promotion with Selectable Free/Discounted Items in SAP Commerce
entry.content:
Background
I need to offer a bundle promotion on my Hybris storefront where purchasing a qualifying product X entitles the customer to choose one item Y from a predefined list. The Y items may be completely free or discounted (e.g. 50% off).

Requirements

  1. Product Detail Page (PDP)

    • Display a promotion widget on X’s PDP listing several eligible Y products.

    • Pre-select one of the Y items by default, but allow the shopper to pick any other.

  2. Shopping Cart Behavior

    • When X is added to cart, automatically add the selected Y as a separate line item with its adjusted price (0 or discounted).

    • If the customer changes or re-adds X, a new Y line item must be created (not merged).

    • Removing X must not remove Y, but should strip Y of its promotional discount (i.e. revert Y to full price).

    • The customer must be able to remove Y independently.

Questions

  • What’s the recommended way to model this in Hybris’s promotion engine?

  • Should I use a Catalog-Level “Bundle” promotion or a Cart-Level “Buy X, Get Y” rule with custom actions?

  • Are there sample rule conditions/actions or extension points you’d suggest to handle the selectable gift list and the cart-line logic above?

Any pointers—rule definitions, code snippets or storefront-customization tips—would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Rome 2025
entry.content:
It's time to announce that the Call for Speakers is now open for SAP Inside Track Rome 2025! 


📅The event will take place on October 3, 2025, and we’re looking for passionate SAP professionals ready to share their insights and experiences with the community.
Whether your expertise is in SAP BTP, SAP BDC, SAP S/4HANA, SAP Business AI, or any other innovative topic in the SAP ecosystem, we want to hear from you!
🎤This is your chance to take the stage, inspire others, and connect with fellow SAP enthusiasts.

👉Submit your session proposal by July 31, 2025 here:
https://lnkd.in/dpNdfSuZ

🗓Stay tuned – registration for participants will open in the coming days, and detailed information about the location will also be shared soon here

A few important things to keep in mind for SAP Inside Track Rome 2025:

🗣️ The event will be held in English – all sessions and presentations should be prepared and delivered in English.

👕The dress code is informal – feel free to dress comfortably and casually.

📩In case of any unexpected changes or if you're unable to attend, please inform us as soon as possible.
We kindly ask for your understanding and sense of responsibility, as this helps us manage the event effectively and with respect for all participants.

entry.title: Re: Using a BAPI or functional module to add a catalog to...
entry.content:
Hello

 

you can use the report PRGN_CREATE_FIORI_FRONTENDROLE to add catalogs, gfroups or spaces with a txt file.

source : https://www.sapsecuritypages.com/mass-creation-of-fiori-roles/

entry.title: Re: Legacy ID in SF LMS Class Connector
entry.content:
Hi @piotr_retecki ,

Still the same logic applies: the legacy ID/ COL_NUM99_VAL is used as the identifier by the Class Connector. Without this info being populated at the classes' records, there is no way to use the Class Connector to update such classes.

Hence, to be able to use the Class Connector for such classes, first it would be necessary to manually populate the Legacy ID for them.

BR,

entry.title: does Joule for consultant support ECC
entry.content: does Joule for consultant support ECC in terms of providing info on standarard SAP functionalities

entry.title: Re: Learn How to Create A Compensation Budget Dashboard in Report Stories
entry.content: Hi, While creating compensation planning dashboard, values are not getting capture. any suggestion please on this.

entry.title: Re: SF LMS Event Based Integration
entry.content:
@FrankKrause- Is your integration using Intelligent Services? We are looking to gather any details on how this was completed/what is the process flow for your organization, meaning how the event based triggered data is retrieved from SFLMS and sent to the downstream system(s) you may be using. What is your data volume?

The current process flow we are referencing is as follows: LMS Item Completion > Learning Event tracked in Intelligent Services > Middleware > OData API > Data Store (Repository) > Downstream Systems (via webservices). This process is not definite, and we are open to additional or different recommendations to reach our end goal. 

Does your solution allow you to retrieve completion data from LMS and publish it to downstream systems on an ongoing basis for real-time compliance validation?

entry.title: Catch Up On-Demand - SAP Fieldglass May 2025 Release Highlights Webinar
entry.content:
We recently hosted the Innovate & Elevate: What's New in the May 2025 SAP Fieldglass Release webinar that showcased some of the latest features and enhancements. Updates under the following areas were highlighted:

  • Activity Items
  • AI & Contingent Labor
  • Configuration Manager Updates incl. SAP BTP SBPA Integration
  • Custom Lookups
  • Services Procurement
  • User Experience

If you missed the event or if you'd like to watch it again, you can access the recorded session here.

Want more information about the SAP Fieldglass 2025.05 Release?

  • Stay up to date on all SAP Fieldglass release information through the What’s New Viewer on the SAP Help Portal.
  • Join the SAP Fieldglass Product Success Work Zone and view the May 2025 Release Resources page to access additional release resources.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Version Update
entry.content:
Hi Evaristo,
You can use Fiori tools to change the minUI5Version via the Application Info view.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIORI_tools/17d50220bcd848aa854c9c182d65b699/c3e0989caf6743a88a52df603f62a52a.html?locale=en-US
or command palette options are shown. 
Try previewing the application after this change and it should load with the newer UI5 version. 

Since you are moving to 1.120.0 (or also higher UI5 version)you can optionally run the ui5 linter to check for best practice (also available via Application Info and Command Palette) for Freestyle Applications.

Kind regards,

Austin

entry.title: Re: Revenue Recognition Key cannot be maintained for FOC item categories
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
I wanted to circle back on this to say that we resolved the issue outlined in my previous comments: 

Audience: Organizations who do not license Employee Central who have found that user search results in the LMS are unexpectedly different upon enabling General Display Name, which is automatically on for all customers with 1H 2025 (see ECT-246553). 

The problem:  We enabled General Display Name on our production environment in anticipation of 1H 2025, since there would no longer be an option to disable it.  We found that when General Display Name was enabled, the sort order of user searches on the LMS side/Learning Administration changed from a format of Lastname, Firstname M. to Firstname M. Lastname.  This presented problems for certain admins who were used to the previous search result sort order. 

The solution: Keeping in mind that we do not currently license Employee Central, the solution we were presented with that we were eventually able to get to work was to make modifications to Configuration ID CONNECTORS. 

Steps: 

⚠️"Your mileage may vary" depending on your configuration, but in our case...

  1. Navigate to Learning Administration\System Administration\Configuration\System Configuration\Edit Configuration ID: CONNECTORS
  2. Make the following adjustments to CONNECTORS
    • Alter the following line to null out DISPLAYNAME; i.e. replace sfuser.field.mapping.data.GENERAL_DISPLAY_NAME=DISPLAYNAME with sfuser.field.mapping.data.GENERAL_DISPLAY_NAME=
    • Add the following line:   sfuser.connector.updateOnNull=[reference any columns that need to be updated when blank and separate by comma/nospace],GENERAL_DISPLAY_NAME
    • Conduct a user search in LMS/Learning and observe the impact on user search results in the LMS. 
    • ⚠️This might go without saying, but it is highly recommended to test this process with a small number of users in your staging environment before making these changes on your production instance. 
    • 💥 CAVEAT: be sure to review Update on Null for User Connector - SF and consult with SAP product support as needed.

entry.title: Erro of "env.supportRelativePaths" when building web version
entry.content:
Hello I'm trying to build for web but i get an error of "env.supportRelativePaths", i don't know what this is or how to fix, can anyone help?

Client Runtime Version: 4.18.4

Full Error:

AB version: 3.27.0
COMMAND:

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2000 --no-experimental-global-navigator  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn

FAILED with ERROR:

warn: You have integration @sba-runtime/integration-builder defined, but it wasn't found in package.json. ERR: Error: Cannot find module '../renative.json'
Require stack:
- ./node_modules/@sba-runtime/integration-builder/lib/config.js
- ./node_modules/@sba-runtime/integration-builder/lib/tasks/taskExport.js
- ./node_modules/@sba-runtime/integration-builder/lib/index.js
- ./node_modules/@rnv/core/lib/modules/index.js
Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/app/.appgyver/app/renative.private.json'
 at Object.openSync (node:fs:561:18)
 at Object.readFileSync (node:fs:445:35)
 at handleCryptoApiKeys (/app/current/buildHooks/dist/index.js:29381:56)
 at /app/current/node_modules/@rnv/core/src/buildHooks/index.ts:21:50
 at Object.dynatraceOnServiceExecutionIndicator [as doInvoke] (/opt/dynatrace/oneagent-paas/agent/bin/1.307.61.20250226-155505/any/nodejs/nodejsagent.js:3776:22)
error: ⨯ ○ export: COMMAND:
node --max-old-space-size=12000 /app/current/node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build
FAILED with ERROR:
> Build failed because of webpack errors
Error: Command failed with exit code 1: node --max-old-space-size=12000 /app/current/node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build
 ⚠ Invalid next.config.js options detected:
 ⚠ Invalid input at "env.supportRelativePaths"
 ⚠ Expected string, received boolean at "env.supportRelativePaths"
 ⚠ Expected undefined, received boolean at "env.supportRelativePaths"
 ⚠ Invalid input at "env.appSwitcherTests"
> Build failed because of webpack errors
Attention: Next.js now collects completely anonymous telemetry regarding usage.
This information is used to shape Next.js' roadmap and prioritize features.
You can learn more, including how to opt-out if you'd not like to participate in this anonymous program, by visiting the following URL:
https://nextjs.org/telemetry

 at makeError (/app/current/node_modules/execa/lib/error.js:60:11)
 at handlePromise (/app/current/node_modules/execa/index.js:118:26)
 at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:105:5)

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite - Attachment Handling
entry.content:
Dear Community,

this blog provides practical insights into handling attachments within the Cloud Integration capability of the SAP Integration Suite

Attachment handling is well documented in the official SAP Help Portal:  SAP HELP - Attachment Handling

Requirement: Process a SOAP message that contains multipart/related attachments. A common approach is to include these attachments in the message body encoded in Base64 format.* 

*Base64 Format is a method for encoding binary data into a string of ASCII characters, it is often used to transmit data that must be handled in text form. 

Approach: Let's cover all of this in a Groovy script and ideally make it reusable via ProcessDirect. 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Parameter as Table: 

Source TypeSource ValueName
chunksizeconstant850
singledatachunkbase64constanttrue/false
datachunkbase64constanttrue/false
singlebase64constanttrue/false
node_nameconstantattachments
replace_payloadconstanttrue/false

Solution:

  • Line 10–15: Some configuration details will be loaded
  • Line 17: All attachments are loaded into a key-value map
  • Line 19–34: Check if attachments exist, prepare a new XML node, and prepare the chunk size if required
  • Line 34 - 78: Iterate over all attachments in the given message and process them according to the external parameter configuration, a new xml with attachments is created
  • Line 81 - 100: Replace the current payload body with the attachments encoded in Base64, or add the new attachments XML at a specific node in the original payload
import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import java.util.Map
import java.util.Iterator
import javax.activation.DataHandler



def Message processData(Message message) {
   
   def replacepayload = message.getProperty("replace_payload").toLowerCase() as String;
   def nodename = message.getProperty("node_name") as String;
   def singlebase64 = message.getProperty("singlebase64").toLowerCase() as String;
   def datachunkbase64 = message.getProperty("datachunkbase64").toLowerCase() as String;
   def singledatachunkbase64 = message.getProperty("singledatachunkbase64").toLowerCase() as String;
   def chunksize = message.getProperty("chunksize") as Integer; 
    
   Map < String, DataHandler > attachments = message.getAttachments();

    if (!attachments.isEmpty())
    {

       def body = message.getBody(java.io.Reader);
       def xmlSlurper = new XmlSlurper()
       def iattachments = new Node(null, 'root');
      
       //split base64 string in small chunks
       def chunkSize = chunksize
       int c = 0; 
       Iterator < DataHandler > it = attachments.values().iterator();
       int i = 1;

    // Loop attachments in SOAP Adapter and convert to Base64 String
      
        while (it.hasNext())
        {
            // bas64 conversion takes place here
            DataHandler attachment = it.next();
            InputStream inputStream = attachment.getInputStream()
            byte[] binaryData = inputStream.bytes; 
            String base64 = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(binaryData);
            // bas64 conversion takes place here
            
            def item = new Node(iattachments,'item',[SEGMENT: i])
            new Node(item,'FILE_ID',i);
            new Node(item,'FILE',attachment.getName());
            new Node(item,'FILESIZE',binaryData.length);
            new Node(item,'DESCRIPTION',attachment.getName());
        
             if (singlebase64 == 'true') {   
            //  example for single base64 line in XML structure 
                 new Node(item,'base64',base64);
            //  example for single base64 line in XML structure 
             }
         
             if (datachunkbase64 == 'true') { 
            // example for base64 chunks in XML structure covert under multiple data nodes    
                def base64Aschunksv1 = new Node(item,'base64',[SEGMENT: i]);
                for (int y = 0; y < base64.length(); y += chunkSize) {
                     int endIndex = Math.min(y + chunkSize, base64.length())
                     new Node(base64Aschunksv1,'data',base64.substring(y, endIndex).toUpperCase()); 
                }
            // example for base64 chunks in XML structure covert under multiple data nodes    
              }
              
            if (singledatachunkbase64 == 'true') {    
            // example for multiple base64 chunks in XML structure each chunk contains a data node     
                for (int y = 0; y < base64.length(); y += chunkSize) {
                     int endIndex = Math.min(y + chunkSize, base64.length())
                     c++; 
                     def base64Aschunksv2 = new Node(item,'base64',[SEGMENT: c]);
                     new Node(base64Aschunksv2,'data',base64.substring(y, endIndex).toUpperCase()); 
                }
            // example for multiple base64 chunks in XML structure each chunk contains a data node      
            }
            message.setProperty("hasAttachment" + i, "true");
            i++;
            c = 0; 
        }
       
       
        def iattachmentxml = groovy.xml.XmlUtil.serialize(iattachments); 

        if (replacepayload == 'true') {
            // ####################### Option 1: Attachments as payload - ignore incomming payload ####################### 
              message.setBody(iattachmentxml);  
            // ####################### Option 1: Attachments as payload - ignore incomming payload ####################### 
        } else {
        // ####################### Option 2: Merge existing XML with new created attachment XML a a specific node ####################### 
                def Node1 = xmlSlurper.parseText(iattachmentxml)
                def Node2 = xmlSlurper.parse(body)
                
                // // find a specific node to insert the attachments  
                def nodetoadd = Node2.'**'.find{it.name() == nodename }
                    nodetoadd.appendNode(Node1.'item')
                def mergedXml = groovy.xml.XmlUtil.serialize(Node2)
                
                message.setBody(mergedXml); 
        // ####################### Option 2: Merge existing XML with new created attachment XML a a specific node ####################### 
        }
    }
    
    return message
}

Results:
Parameters to be configured:

 

ParameterOptionResult/illustration
1_replace_payloadSetting this parameter to True will replace the original payload with a <root><item> block that contains the attachments.

1_replace_payload

If set to false in combination with 1_node_name, the payload will not be replaced, and the attachments will be added under the specified node instead.
1_node_nameNode name in the payload under which the attachments node should be added (e.g., attachments).
2_chunk_sizeThe size of the data chunk in bytes (default is 850). 
2_data_chunk_base64Set to true or false to enable or disable Base64 encoding with multiple <data> chunk nodes.
2_single_base64Set to true or false to enable or disable the use of a single <base64> node.
2_single_data_chunk_base64Set to true or false to enable or disable the use of multiple <base64> nodes, each containing multiple <data> nodes.

Conclusion:

This attachment handling approach allows you to process your messages as a single payload, including attachments encoded in Base64 format. Whenever an Attachments section is available in your message (e.g., when using the Mail Adapter), this method—using DataHandler and related techniques—enables you to process that content effectively.

Of course, there may be slightly different requirements depending on your specific use case. However, this should provide a solid starting point for individual adjustments and customization.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori - Remove Adapt Filter Button

entry.title: Re: Rethink ALM: Moving to SAP Cloud ALM as a Clean Core Strategy for Application Lifecycle Manageme
entry.content:
Hello Ben,

In general I agree for the view of resetting ALM processes.  However, for middle to big size companies, CALM Features are not comparable with ChaRM and Focused Build transport management functionalities.  Difficult to make the transition for those customers that rely in a powerful change management tool.  We need to wait longer or select a third party tool.

Esteban Hartzstein

entry.title: Re: Using a BAPI or functional module to add a catalog to...
entry.content: Also one blog post by SAP: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/fiori-for-s-4hana-mass-maintenance-of-business-roles-for-sap-fiori/ba-p/13366973

entry.title: How to make a result bold in ALV
entry.content:
Hi there! I want to display a result in ALV in bold style if the case was successed. The result that I'm talking about is ls_alv_line because it contain the result. 

Thank you

 CASE ls_grp_nature-id_groupe.
        WHEN 1.
          CASE ls_nature-id_nature.
            WHEN '1'.
              CLEAR ls_alv_line.
              ls_alv_line-id_groupe        = ls_grp_nature-id_groupe.
              ls_alv_line-id_nature        = ls_nature-id_nature.
              ls_alv_line-description      = ls_nature-description.

              ls_alv_line-exercice = ls_cpc_line-total_ex.
              ls_alv_line-exercice_pre = ls_cpc_line-total_ex_prec.
              APPEND  ls_alv_line TO et_esg_alv. CASE ls_grp_nature-id_groupe.
        WHEN 1.
          CASE ls_nature-id_nature.
            WHEN '1'.
              CLEAR ls_alv_line.
              ls_alv_line-id_groupe        = ls_grp_nature-id_groupe.
              ls_alv_line-id_nature        = ls_nature-id_nature.
              ls_alv_line-description      = ls_nature-description.

              ls_alv_line-exercice = ls_cpc_line-total_ex.
              ls_alv_line-exercice_pre = ls_cpc_line-total_ex_prec.
              APPEND  ls_alv_line TO et_esg_alv.

Thanks,

entry.title: SAP Screen Personas Installation
entry.content:
We have been working towards installing the screen personas add-on in one of our sandbox environments for exploration and demo purposes. 

When our basis team did the original installation, it seems like they did not install the correct support pack versions, so now when I look at the installed product versions, it just has SP00 listed. I noticed this when I first tried accessing the /personas/admin screen and the UI looked really outdated.

What is the best approach for getting this up-to-date? Can we just use the SPAM/SAINT process to install all of the support packs up to SP19?

Our basis team also provided us this error they encountered when attempting to continue that process:

Appreciate any feedback or guidance on how to proceed.

entry.title: SAP MII BLS Transactions alternative in SAP DM (Digital Manufacturing)
entry.content:
Hi,

@ManoelCosta @salvatore_castro and All SAP DM experts,

While we are transforming MII to DM (Digital Manufacturing) one area is how DM can help in replacing existing highly customized MII transactions/BLS where lots of ZBAPIs RFCs are used and data is uploaded downloaded to and from ECC, SQL etc.? DM talks about Serive Registry but in that case we will have to still use MII. What after MII end of life and complete replacement of MII?

I could not find any straight forward solution for this. Please help with the the details.

Thanks and regards

entry.title: Re: Fiori App: Manage Sales Order V2 does not start due t...
entry.content: show me what you have activated

entry.title: Water Track at the SAP for Energy and Utilities Conference 2025: Feedback and Lessons Learnt
entry.content:
As a result of the policy to provide a dedicated track for Water and Wastewater Services use cases initiated at the International SAP for Utilities Conference 2023 in Basel, it is becoming a tradition to meet a significant number of water and wastewater services companies interested on innovative strategies and technologies to drive digital transformation in their companies.

Source: TAC Insights mosaic
Have a look at the detailed agenda.

This year the agenda of the track was centered in the gain of operational efficiencies by providing three inspirational cases

  • SAP for Water and Wastewater Services, Building the Resilient Water Company by Miquel Carbo, SAP
  • ArcGIS by Esri on HANA: Building Next Generation of Integrated Asset Management by Inge Opreel, Farys and Niels van der Vaart, ESRI
  • Streamlining Service Operations: SAP Field Service Management (FSM) Integration at Vitens by Marion Eijkelkamp and  Krijn Verdaasdonk, Vitens

Together with this dedicated track, the Conference offered additional water-specific or water-relevant conferences before and after the Water Track,  configuring an entire agenda specifically for delegates of this industry:

  • Latest Innovations in SAP Asset Management (Asset Management track)
  • Business Data Cloud – Unlocking the Power of Unified Data
  • SAP Asset Performance Management (APM) at AkerBP:  From Test Environment to Production
  • Unlocking the Potential of AI with SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) and Datasphere (SAP Microforum at 10:30am
  • A Day in a Life of a Water Drop: Deep Dive into the Benefits of Asset Management at the Lifecycle of a Waterdrop (session needs to be pre-booked via the app)
  • Transformation from OnPrem to SAP RISE: Lessons from Andel’s Journey (AI Track)

First slot, entitled “SAP for Water and Wastewater Services, Building the Resilient Water Company” elaborated around the concept of resilience among Water distribution companies: water systems must be able to withstand and recover from various challenges such as climate change, population growth, and infrastructure challenges. It requires implementing strategies and technologies that ensure a continuous and reliable supply of clean water, even in the face of disruptions.

This includes the use of smart metering platforms, intelligent reporting, and satellite imaging to monitor and manage water resources effectively. By building resilience, government/water companies can enhance their capacity to adapt to changing conditions, protect public health, and support sustainable development.

Farys' use case story entitled  “Transforming Water Management with SAP and GIS Integration”, provide attendees an opportunity to gain insights on how Farys optimizes water management by integrating ArcGIS Utility Network with SAP S/4HANA, creating a seamless connection between GIS and enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems. This successful collaboration demonstrates how utilities can streamline asset management, optimize field operations, and enable data-driven decision-making. Explore the tangible benefits Farys achieved, from enhanced operational efficiency to smarter spatial insights, paving the way for innovation in utility management:

  • Benefits of integrating GIS and ERP systems
  • Focus on asset management
  • Tools explored to enhance operations and decision-making

Vitens use case “Streamlining Service Operations: SAP Field Service Management (FSM) Integration” brought a great story about

How Vitens, the primary water supplier of the Netherlands,  successfully transformed its work order scheduling and management for, at this moment, 240 technicians and more to come to serve for 6 million Dutch inhabitants and commercial customers, maintaining a total of 2.7 million connections, 48.000 km pipeline network and 93 production facilities.

 

During the presentation of their SAP Field Service Management (FSM) implementation, Vitens addressed the challenges of outdated systems and delivered a modern, user-friendly planning tool tailored to its diverse departmental needs. The solution, integrated with S/4HANA, ensures efficient planning, enhanced user experience, and robust support for planners and technicians alike. Main points of the presentation were:

 

  • How SAP FSM is being used across different Vitens' departments, adapting to varied planning methods.
  • Implementation effort and challenges
  • Process improvement achievements to ensure uninterrupted service and optimal resource allocation

 

 

Overall, the collaboration and networking among attendees, this is utility companies and SAP partners has raised again the level of expectations of delegates. Feedback received by Water and Waste Water companies has been very positive on the high quality inspirational speeches and the facilitation of fluent and interesting networking to a level that makes very difficult but a motivating challenge to keep for next year!

entry.title: Re: Run Foreign Trade Regulations Z4
entry.content: Hello, I assume this relates to SAP S/4HANA, because there's no customizing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition using the IMG. Best regards, Henrike

entry.title: The committed amount is not updated when a purchase order or purchase requisition is rejected.
entry.content:
In the case where a purchase order is rejected in the flexible workflow, the committed amount is not updated. 

Is there a way to update automatically the committed amount  when the task of the workflow is rejected?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: The committed amount is not updated when a purchase o...
entry.content:
Reason for system behavior and Possible work around available as of now if decided to not resubmit the Rejected document and expect the Budget / Commitment to be released or updated is  updated in below KBA

3607859 - Update of Committed Amount When a Purchase Order or Purchase Requisition is Rejected - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Handle persons leaving the organisation when provisioning with IPS
Re: Handle persons leaving the organisation when provisio...
entry.content:
I am now trying to combine user active and membership of the group
 
So
 {
                "condition": "$.active == false",
                "constant": false,
                "targetPath": "$.active"
            },
 
If user set inactive in IAS, it remains inactive through the transformation
 
                "condition": "$.active != false && $.memberOf[?(@ == 's4s_qas ')] empty true",
                "constant": false,
                "targetPath": "$.active"
            },
 
If user set active and group s4s_qas is not assigned, $.active needs to be false
 
 
            {
                "condition": "$.active != false && $.memberOf[?(@ == 's4s_qas ')] empty false",
                "constant": true,
                "targetPath": "$.active"
            },
 
If user set active and group s4s_qas is  assigned, $.active needs to be true
 
 
 
I tried all kinds of options here, but each time my users are not processed. logging shows users are read, but write does not occur. 
 
Hope anyone can help here

many thanks for your help... it worked out.

Milan

entry.title: More then one object for multilangual content in SAP SuccessFactors Learning
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I want to find a way on how we can share Mandatory annual trainings in an efficient way with as little room for errors as possible.

Right now, we create one item for each language and put them in a curriculum requirement to be distributed via the Curricula and an assignment profile. That works, but there were quite a few human-errors in the past.

I know, that it is possible in an item to include the same content in different languages and choose in the setting, that the item gets moved to the learning history, if one content ( = one language) is completed.

HOWEVER, I did not see an option where I can do it this way when I have several content objects with different languages. For example I'd have the following content that is relevant to the training:

 

Chapter 1 - GermanChapter 1 - English
Chapter 2 - GermanChapter 2 - English

Assuming that the chapters can not be merged obviously.

Does someone have an idea how to handle the rollout in a lean way?

Thank you so much!

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Issue with Adapt UI in Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
I tried using the Adapt UI feature from the Fiori Launchpad. (The button appears after assigning SAP_UI_FLEX_KEY_USER to my user), but after clicking it:

  • The Adapt UI toolbar loads, but nothing is editable.

  • No UI elements get highlighted when hovering.

  • I can't right-click or select any fields for editing.

  • It just stays on the shell header/navigation — no interaction with the actual app content

It seems like the app doesn’t support runtime adaptation

Let me know if anyone has encountered this or if we have a recommended workaround.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Automatic Requisition update based on Position field changes
entry.content:
Hello,

Can anyone please suggest, how can we exclude the Closed job Req for auto updating position deatils, we just want for Approved Reqs only. we tried to remove Internal Status Closed= 2 But when we run the job, it is throwing and error and also tried to add Closed in filter but still it didn't worked. Is there any way where we can exclude the Closed/ Cancelled job Req auto updating?

 

Thankyou!

entry.title: Re: 在管理付款申请APP页面，执行付款策略时，选择了银行之后，无法选择金融交易类型，导致付款申请无法下推，不能生成付款凭证
entry.content:
Machine translation:

On the Manage Payment Request app page, when executing the payment strategy, once the bank is selected, the financial transaction type cannot be selected, causing the payment request to be pushed down and the payment document cannot be generated

1. In the Manage Payment Request app page, when executing the payment strategy, the financial transaction type cannot be selected after the bank has been selected, which prevents payment requests from being pushed down and payment documents cannot be generated; 2. If the financial transaction type for generating the cash flow statement is cancelled, the correct cash flow statement cannot be generated; how to process it

entry.title: Re: Connect with SAP Community at SAP Sapphire and Share Your Special SAP Event Moment!
entry.content: @Qualiture Those were the best of times Ro !!! We are still looking forward to hosting you guys in the US 🙂 Give Mo and the kids our love !!! You are the best and don't be naughty 😉

entry.title: How to import existing on-premises application from ABAP repository in SAP BAS?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a question regarding working with on-premise systems in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS).

In SAP Web IDE, we used to connect our on-premise system through destinations configured via the SAP Cloud Connector. Then, we would use the ABAP repository option to search for an existing application by its technical name, import it into our workspace, make the necessary changes, and deploy it back to the system.

Is it possible to follow the same process in SAP BAS? If yes, could someone please explain the steps or share a guide on how to import an existing on-premise application from the ABAP repository into BAS, make changes, and deploy it back to the on-premise system?

I have gone through several blogs related to how to migrate projects from SAP Web IDE to BAS. However, I haven’t come across any blog specifically explaining how to use the same on-premise application import and deploy process in BAS like we do in Web IDE.

It would be really helpful if someone could provide resources, a detailed guide, or share their experience on this topic.

Thanks in advance!

Thanks, 

Prasad Reddy

entry.title: Re: Automatic Requisition update based on Position field changes
entry.content:
Hi @Rucha30 , in my post above from 2023 March 08, you can see how we built it into our business rule. Instead of excluding Closed, we only included Open and On Hold job reqs. That way our Closed reqs and any that are Pending don't get updated. We didn't want Pending reqs to update, because we have multiple approvers of job reqs, and if the data on the job req changes midway through the approval process, that's bad for auditing. We also figured if the req is only Pending, then the recruiter can just cancel the req and start over with good data from the Position.

Hope that helps!

[Edited to add:] If you're talking about the Integration Center job, in my same post above you can see the screenshot where we included a filter for Approved, so that might be what you are missing.

entry.title: SAP RAP: Create Order with Business Partner
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm fairly new to RAP and would like to know what's the best way to implement the following scenario.

I would like to create an OData service for S/4Hana which is able to create an order and a business partner via deep create for example a customer or contact person.

I have found the Business Object Interface for the Business Partner "I_BusinessPartnerTP_2" which I can hope I can integrate into my service. I have also created a simple RAP service that is able to create the order as an unmanaged scenario.

Now I'm not sure how to associate my existing service with the Business Object Interface so I can create the order and the business partner together.

Thanks a lot

Lennart

entry.title: Re: SAP MII BLS Transactions alternative in SAP DM (Digit...
entry.content:
Hello @khaleelurrehman_badeghar and thanks for the post.

Without knowing too much about your customizations and what you're able to achieve at a business process level, and for this I highly recommend leveraging our SAP Customer Evolution Kit for Manufacturing.

That said, I can still provide some insight into the technical components to map over the processes into SAP Digital Manufacturing Production Process Designer.  For this to work you have to first wrap your ZBAPIs into one or multiple Enterprise Services (depends on what you're doing) and there are videos that I have seen in the past on this and also core SAP Enterprise Service Help documentation available.  Once you have the WSDLs created for these services you can map them into SAP Digital Manufacturing via the Manage Service Registry app.  Once their definition is mapped into here you can then consume it as a "block" in the production process designer flow.

Hope this helps,

Sam

entry.title: Re: Automatic Generation of Packaging item for Goods issue S4 HANA
entry.content:
@harshnama 

Please check what is the delivery type you have used for the delivery creation for that delivery type you have to assign item category VERP and item usage PACK then default item category HUPM

entry.title: Re: Original print and reprint PO
entry.content: I have found if the MRP Controller field is "Blank" the reprint option is not permitted.

entry.title: Re: How to introduce new MVC Interceptor to OCC extension?
entry.content:
In your custom occ extension , you can use a HandlerInterceptor : 

@Component

public class CustomHandlerInterceptor implements HandlerInterceptor {

    @Override
    public boolean preHandle(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, Object handler) {
        //your logic here
    }
}

And then add your HandlerInterceptor to the InterceptorRegistry using a WebMvcConfigurer (always in your occ extension) : 

@Configuration

public class OccWebConfig implements WebMvcConfigurer {

    @Autowired
    private CustomHandlerInterceptor customHandlerInterceptor;

    @Override
    public void addInterceptors(InterceptorRegistry registry) {
        registry.addInterceptor(customHandlerInterceptor)
                .addPathPatterns("/**");
    }
}

Make sure that your customocc-web-spring.xml is scanning the HandlerInterceptor and the WebMvcConfigurer packages (<context:component-scan base-package="com.project.occ"/>)

entry.title: Document not shown in Generic Object Sevices on delivery item level
entry.content:
Hi all,

using ArchiveLink we have a reference to a document in the Archive-System. The link is on item level in the delivery. We see an entry in Link-Table TOA02 and can access the archived document using transaction OAER.

The document was created using output control on item level. Customizing of output type and Archive link seem ok.

But we cannot access the document from delivery item level, it is not shown in the Generic Object Sevices (Attachment list).

What is missing?
Kind regards Elko

entry.title: Re: Validation Rule - Compare Opening balances to Prior y...
entry.content:
Hi Martin,

Thank you - I saw the help too earlier.

My question is re 2023 OP.

Previously I tested in the 2502 cloud version selecting YTD for previous year and as you noted it selects the parallel prior year period (e.g. 2025.06 vs. 2024.06) instead of 2025.0 vs. 2024.12). I accessed the 2023 OP FPS01 version (we are currently migrating from EC-CS to GR so I can't test yet) and did not see any option to further limit to period 12.
How do you limit - Where' to the YTD calculation. The the rule should then validate YTD up to period 12 for the previous year."?
Regards,
Eyal

entry.title: Re: How to make a result bold in ALV
entry.content: ALV for Web Dynpro?

entry.title: Re: Understanding Crystal Report Connections
entry.content: CR doesn't rwecommend using multiple Commands to access the same database. If you must use a subreport per Command

entry.title: Where are Time Account Rules maintained and configured?
entry.content:
For Time Administration, where are Time Account Rules maintained and configured?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Where are Time Account Rules maintained and configured?
entry.content:
Where are Time Account Rules maintained and configured?

  1. Go to Business Configuration work center.
  2. Enter the Overview view.
  3. Search for Time Accounts.
  4. Highlight the version for the relevant country and Change Immediately.
  5. Under the header Time Account Rules select Maintain Time Account Rules.
  6. Find the relevant Time Account Type.

entry.title: Re: Pl Deliver time time option in external service PR no...
entry.content:
Hello @ajit2804 ,

Please refer the MRP2 view of the material in the material master. Check if the planned delivery time is maintained or not. This planned delivery time gets copied into the PR.

 

Vaibhav Mishra

entry.title: Re: Problem with my SAP Fiori Elements app
entry.content: Hi Radoslaw_kiela2 Following your advice, I checked the Error_LOG by entering the query that appeared in the console, and indeed, it showed a problem with "SAP_CreatedDateTime" The property 'SAP_CreatedDateTime' has an invalid value of '739379.0000000' What do you recommend doing next? Checking something else to get more context in this case?

entry.title: Re: Problem with my SAP Fiori Elements app
entry.content: Hi Junwu I checked the Error_LOG by entering the query that appeared in the console, and indeed, it showed a problem with "SAP_CreatedDateTime" The property 'SAP_CreatedDateTime' has an invalid value of '739379.0000000' What do you recommend doing next? Should I check something else to get more context in this case? Thanks EBZ

entry.title: Re: Alphanumeric number ranges for Equipment in Plant Mai...
entry.content:
Hello @Prasenjit91 ,

Please put a deletion flag on the non-relevant equipment. Then enhance the drop-down list in the notification and order creation screen by removing the non-relevant equipment from drop down list. If you create a new one, then tracking the maintenance history will become a challenge for end users. Even if equipment is old, history is still relevant. Recreation of equipment with a different number range looks good, but from the viewpoint of tracking maintenance history, it is not a good idea.

Vaibhav

entry.title: Re: Translation Problem in Adobe Form
entry.content: It is 2025, and this solution still works. 😄

entry.title: Question: Versioning logic in BrokerDetail
entry.content:
Dear SAP APM and Advanced Workflow expert, 

We have the following requirements:

A client has a workflow called “Profile Changes,” where different users update Agent or ATM Profiles. The client now wants to:

  1. Add functionality to this workflow to allow upline (territory) modifications.
  2. Automate the versioning process and ensure the impacted records in BrokerDetail are versioned accordingly.

    We have two possible solutions for the versioning logic:

    • Developing it in APMe using QBQuery
    • Implementing it within Advanced Workflow

      Please advise which solution you recommend and why?

      SAP SuccessFactors Agent Performance Management Advanced Workflow

entry.title: SAC outer join of two models
entry.content:
Hi all,

There is a need to compare data of two models (both with measure and w/o account). As result only those records of model A should be shown that do not match model B. How it can be developed?

P.S. I have found options that might help, but I cannot find them in the system:

‘All primary data’ – similar to left outer join

‘All data’ – similar to full outer join

‘Intersecting data only’ – similar to inner join

Best regards,

Oleksandr

entry.title: Re: SF LMS Event Based Integration
entry.content:
Hi @MelanieBelzile , yes we use Intelligent Services in our integration.

In SF LMS Admin we've configured the Service event bus (flag sebPublishedEventTypes[LearningCompletion]=true) and have set up in Intelligent Services an "Event Connector". Within the Event Connector you define the endpoint where the event message shall be delivered to. In our setup we've chosen SAP CPI.

Here, we receive the event, read "total hours" from SF LMS via SF LMS OData API and map all the information for the target application. From the target application the CPI iFlow receives the response if delivery is/was successful and passes it to SF.

From my experience this integration was pretty slim and is state-of-the-art. And its (almost) real-time (2 sec. from SF LMS to target system).

entry.title: Re: Custom field with multiline in S4 public cloud-key us...
entry.content: thanks Prashant. Even if i resize, when i edit it, it gives works like one line inout field

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP environment integration with ChaRM .
entry.content: Yes, you can export released BTP ABAP Transports to Cloud TMS and use SolMan/ChaRM to orchestrate Cloud TMS transports across your landscape. See this blogpost: Cloud Transport Management for SAP BTP ABAP Enviro... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Launch ByDesign UIs from External Applications
entry.content:
Hi Knut,

Very useful post.

Quick question - is it possible to link directly to the "View All" screen of the respective document(s)?

Ideally - even further to the "Items"/"Details" etc. subsection of View All... is this possible?

Is there a definitions list for the parameters (bo, node, operation, etc. etc.) that we can use as a reference document for the different options available?

Many thanks,

Phil

entry.title: Re: Custom field with multiline in S4 public cloud-key us...
entry.content: Thanks Prasanth. Even if i resize, when i edit it, it works like on-line input field, centered. Could not enter multiple lines. Can you please advice

entry.title: FINS_ACDOC_POST133 House Bank still assigned to wrong G/L sub account
entry.content:
FINS_ACDOC_POST133 House Bank still assigned to wrong G/L sub account

New G/L Accounts for Bank Accounts

As starting point we created nee G/L Accounts for showing in more detail the related bank accounts in the balance sheet.

  • 11001900 Raiffeisen Bank Account – HUF
  • 11001901 Raiffeisen Bank Account – EUR
  • 11001902 Raiffeisen Bank Account – USD

For example:

 

and the related bank transfer subaccounts.

11001920 Raiffeisen Bank Transfer – HUF

11001921 Raiffeisen Bank Transfer - EUR

11001922 Raiffeisen Bank Transfer – USD

For example:

 

 

New Bank Accounts

Then we created accordingly the new bank account master data.

For example:

 

Upload Bank Statement

Now I want to upload the bank statement. However, for posting the statement an error message shows up.

FINS_ACDOC_POST133

 

Analysis

I reviewed the following

Note: 3376166 - House bank & & is not assigned to G/L account & in company code & (FINS_ACDOC_POST133) - SAP for Me

Blog: How to use Bank Reconciliation Account in Payment ... - SAP Community

This is the configuration in SSCUI 101024 but I can´t figure out how to adjust the settings in order to post to 11001920 instead of 11001080.

 

What do I need to adjust for changing the accounting determination subject to the new subaccounts created?

Many thanks

Sebastian

entry.title: Explore Our Signature Offerings: Access Essential Product Information
entry.content:
Explore Our Signature Offerings: Access Essential Product Information

In this blog post, we provide you with all the necessary links from the SAP Sapphire events in Orlando and Madrid, allowing you to navigate through our signature offerings SAP Business Data Cloud, SAP Business Accelerator Hub, SAP MaxAttention and how you can make the most of SAP MaxAttention’s assistance regarding AI. For more details, you can also check out Anja's Spotlight Sessions in Orlando and Madrid.

SAP Business Data Cloud

Unlocking the Power of Your Business Data: This is our fully managed SaaS solution that unifies and governs all SAP data and seamlessly connects with third-party data

  • Get an overview and take the product tour
  • Get a free SAP Business Data Cloud Assessment

 


SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Explore our Business Transformation Content & Accelerators designed to support customers’ strategic objectives and industry specific needs alongside our SAP solutions.

  • Central entry point

 

SAP MaxAttention

Find out more about SAP MaxAttention and benefit from a strategic long-term partnership for successful collaboration with SAP.

  • Check out the services and directly request a meeting

 

AI assistance from SAP MaxAttention

  • This introductory video including a demo dashboard will show you what AI assistance from SAP MaxAttention is about.
  • If you are interested in updates on AI assistance from SAP MaxAttention, reach out to us.

entry.title: Re: Can Flexible Column Layout added inside a Object Page...
entry.content: Hi Rithika,

entry.title: PPDS planning board Resource Sorting
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In PPDS planning board (/N/SAPAPO/CDPS0) transaction, my client has below queries with this highlighted "Resource list" pane,

  1. By default in what basis the Resources in this Resource list pane is sorted? as it seems random
  2. How to sort the Resources in this list based on Operation sequence?

Regards,

Jeffrey

entry.title: Re: SAP Walkme and SAP Enable Now
entry.content: Hi all, can I just ask a follow up question: Will WalkMe work with SAP ECC, or only S/4HANA? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Can Flexible Column Layout added inside a Object Page...
entry.content: Hi Rithika, Thank you for your response. One question
